summary: CRITICAL: Missing fixture files. Test harness copies .actrc (line 69) which doesn't exist; workflow and test harness reference license-config.json but never create/provide it. Will fail immediately. Security: actions/checkout@v4 unpinned—violates SHA pinning best practice. Architecture: No artifact storage for compliance-report.txt; no structured test output (JUnit/XML). Module design is sound (good separation, mockable lookup, proper Set-StrictMode). PowerShell conventions correct (shell: pwsh, -ErrorActionPreference Stop). If .actrc and license-config.json were provided and action pinned to SHA, code would be shippable but lacking CI/CD maturity (artifacts, test result parsing).
